character.bio: A young wrestler considered to bethe next big thing. He debuted with hisadoptive father Tom as his trainer, but wasquickly made a heel due to his perceivedsurliness.

alex_standing_heavy_punch_h.note: Hold down the button for over 16 frames to change its properties

alex_standing_heavy_punch_charged.note: Can be canceled into Prowler StanceAdds 13 frames of advantage on Punish Counter

alex_standing_heavy_kick_h.note: Produces a crumple stun for 23 frames when the attack lands as a Punish CounterHold down the button for over 16 frames to change its properties

alex_standing_heavy_kick_charged.note: Can be canceled into Prowler StanceJuggle state time is extended when attack lands as a Punish Counter.

alex_crouching_medium_punch_m.note: 4 frames of recovery added when the attack misses

alex_crouching_heavy_punch_h.note: Can be canceled into Prowler StanceForces a juggle state on Punish CounterForces the opponent into a standing position

alex_crouching_heavy_kick_h.note: Knockdown time extended when the attack lands as a Punish Counter, and changes to Hard Knockdown

alex_jumping_medium_punch.note: Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

alex_jumping_heavy_punch.note: Forces a slam knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponent

alex_prowler_stance.note: Can transition into any follow-up attack starting from the 18th frame

alex_low_rush.note: Can cancel into Slash Elbow from frame 1Can cancel into Tactical Hop and Air Stampede from frame 18Can cancel into any follow-up attack from frame 20 except for Low Rush and Low RetreatCan cancel into any follow-up attack from frame 28

alex_low_retreat.note: Can cancel into any follow-up attack from frame 31

alex_l_slashing_elbow.input: (During Prowler Stance or Low Rush) → + LP
alex_l_slashing_elbow.note: Forces a juggle state when the attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter.

alex_m_slashing_elbow.input: (During Prowler Stance or Low Rush) → + MP
alex_m_slashing_elbow.note: Forces a juggle state when the attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter.

alex_h_slashing_elbow.input: (During Prowler Stance or Low Rush) → + HP
alex_h_slashing_elbow.note: Forces a juggle state when the attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter.

alex_palm_jab.note: Can be rapid canceledCan cancel into any follow-up attack from frame 15

alex_shoulder_launcher.note: Transitions into Falling Moon on Counter and Punish CounterDeals 2200 damageGains 2000 Super Art gauge

alex_heavy_lariat.context: (During Prowler Stance) (Hold the button to change effect)
alex_heavy_lariat.input: (During Prowler Stance) (Hold the button to change effect) HP
alex_heavy_lariat.note: When the button is held, 2 hits of super armor is added from frame 6Hold down the button for over 13 frames to change its properties

alex_heavy_lariat_charged.note: Super Armor for 2 attack from frames 6 - 16Turns the opponent around on Counter and Punish Counter

alex_tactical_hop.note: Can perform moves from frame 21Considered airborne from frames 7 - 36

alex_air_stampede.note: Considered airborne from frames 9 - 30Produces a ground bound on Punish Counter

alex_sweep_combination_1.note: Can cancel into any follow-up attack from frame 43Transitions into Flying Suplex on Counter and Punish CounterDeals 1700 damageGains 1000 Super Art gauge

alex_sweep_combination_2.note: Can cancel into any follow-up attack from frame 46Transitions into Flying Suplex on Counter and Punish CounterDeals 1700 damageGains 1000 Super Art gauge

alex_hyper_takedown.input: (During Prowler Stance) (When near opponent) LP + LK
alex_hyper_takedown.note: Transitions into Death Valley Bomb on Counter and Punish CounterDeals 2200 damageGains 2000 Super Art gauge

alex_dangerous_armbar.level: (During Prowler Stance)(When close to a standing opponent)  LL
alex_dangerous_armbar.note: Considered airborne from frames 15 - 26Transitions into Spiral DDT on Counter and Punish CounterDeals 2300 damageGains 3000 Super Art gauge

alex_oblique_stomp_m.note: Transitions into Collapsing Diver on Counter and Punish CounterDeals 2200 damageGains 2000 Super Art gauge

alex_flying_cross_chop.note: Recovery changes depending on the height of the attack when it hits or is blocked

alex_palm_strikes.note: Can only transition to Prowler Stance on hit

alex_twisted_drop.note: Can only transition to Prowler Stance on hit

alex_m_flash_axe_m.note: Can only transition to Prowler Stance on hit

alex_od_flash_chop.note: Can only transition to Prowler Stance on hit

alex_l_aerial_knee_smash_l.note: Invincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 10Considered airborne from frames 5 - 32Does not hit an opponent standing on the ground

alex_m_aerial_knee_smash_m.note: Invincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 16Considered airborne from frames 6 - 34Does not hit an opponent standing on the ground

alex_h_aerial_knee_smash_h.note: Invincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 21Considered airborne from frames 16 - 42

alex_od_aerial_knee_smash.note: Invincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 17Considered airborne from frames 12 - 38

alex_l_power_bomb.note: Damage set to 2875 on Punish Counter

alex_m_power_bomb.note: With Classic ControlsDoes 2875 individual damage when the attack lands as a Punish CounterWith Modern ControlsDoes 2300 individual damage when the attack lands as a Punish Counter

alex_h_power_bomb.note: Damage set to 2875 on Punish Counter

alex_od_power_bomb.note: With Classic ControlsDoes 3335 individual damage when the attack lands as a Punish CounterWith Modern ControlsDoes 2668 individual damage when the attack lands as a Punish Counter

alex_od_power_drop.note: Can transition to Omega Wing Buster

alex_sa1_raging_spear.note: Invincible to strikes and throws between frames 1 - 8Values do not change when the attack lands as a counter or Punish CounterThe minimum guaranteed damage is 30%

alex_sa2_sledgecross_hammer.note: Completely invincible on frames 1 - 16Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 40%Attack does not transition into the cinematic attack when hitting an airborne opponent*Does 2000 damage and produces a wall splatValues do not change on counter or Punish Counter

alex_sa2_omega_wing_buster.note: Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 40%

alex_sa3_the_final_prison.context: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below)
alex_sa3_the_final_prison.input: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below) ↓↘→↓↘→ + P
alex_sa3_the_final_prison.note: Completely invincible between frames 1 - 16The minimum guaranteed damage is 50%Values do not change when the attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter* Can only be canceled into from special moves

alex_ca_the_final_prison.context: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below)
alex_ca_the_final_prison.input: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below) ↓↘→↓↘→ + P
alex_ca_the_final_prison.note: Completely invincible between frames 1 - 16The minimum guaranteed damage is 50%Values do not change when the attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter* Can only be canceled into from special moves

alex_arm_lock.note: Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:- Deals 2040 damage- Super Art gauge increases by 4000- Forces a hard knockdown

alex_guillotine_hammer.note: Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:- Deals 2040 damage- Super Art gauge increases by 4000- Forces a hard knockdown

alex_illegal_knees.note: Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:- Deals 2040 damage- Super Art gauge increases by 4000- Forces a hard knockdown

alex_drive_impact_lariat_kick.note: Super Armor for 2 attacks between frames 1 - 27Produces a wall splat if the pushback on hit causes the opponent to connect with the stage wallOn Punish Counter or after a successful hit after Super Armor absorbs a hit, the following properties change:- Produces a crumple stun if the opponent is standing on the ground- Juggle state time is increased if the opponent is in the air- Super Art gauge increases by 3000

alex_drive_reversal_block.level: (When blocking or during a successful Drive Parry)  HH
alex_drive_reversal_block.context: (When blocking or during a successful Drive Parry)
alex_drive_reversal_block.note: Recoverable damageCompletely invincible between frames 1 - 225 frames of recovery added on hit

alex_drive_reversal_wakeup.note: Recoverable damageCompletely invincible between frames 1 - 205 frames of recovery added on hit

alex_drive_parry.context: (Hold the button to extend the move's duration)
alex_drive_parry.input: (Hold the button to extend the move's duration) MP + MK
alex_drive_parry.note: *1 Can be canceled from the 4th frame via Drive Rush*2 Parry hitbox is extended for as long as the buttons are heldOnly blocks can be performed during the recovery periodAlways in Punish Counter state during execution

alex_perfect_parry_strike.note: Perfect Parry activates when an attack is absorbed on the frame a parry is input, or on the next frame. (For high and overhead attacks, the player must press the direction away from the opponent. For low attacks, down and back)If no direction is inputted the result will be a regular parry with an additional Drive increase of 3000.Fully invincible for 5 frames once recovery is over (invincibility not granted if you continue the parry)The player on the receiving end of a Perfect Parry cannot cancel and is forced into a Punish Counter state until their move is finished

alex_perfect_parry_projectile.note: Perfect Parry activates when an attack is absorbed on the frame a parry is input, or on the next frameNo screen freeze occursThe player on the receiving end of a Perfect Parry cannot cancel and is forced into a Punish Counter state until their move is finished

alex_parry_drive_rush.note: Screen freeze occurs until the 10th frame* Can be canceled into an attack on the 9th frame of the move   Can be canceled into actions other than a parry from the 24th frame

alex_cancel_drive_rush.input: (While connecting with a special-cancelable move) →→ + /5/6MP + MK
alex_cancel_drive_rush.note: Screen freeze occurs until the 9th frame* Can be canceled into an attack from the 10th frame of the move   Can be canceled into actions other than a parry from the 25th frame
